name: diag-graph-extent
description: Measure node position bounding box + camera setup to understand why edges look tiny.

commands: (async () => { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1200)); const r = window.__qualiaRenderer; const sm = r.getSceneManager(); const pos = sm._store.getActivePositions(); const ids = Object.keys(pos); const xs = ids.map(id => pos[id][0]); const ys = ids.map(id => pos[id][1]); const zs = ids.map(id => pos[id][2]); return { nodeCount: ids.length, xRange: [Math.min(...xs), Math.max(...xs)], yRange: [Math.min(...ys), Math.max(...ys)], zRange: [Math.min(...zs), Math.max(...zs)], firstFew: ids.slice(0, 4).map(id => ({ id, pos: pos[id].map(n => Math.round(n * 10) / 10) })) }; })()
